authors: Katherine Kountz Mor Yachin Carol K. Winkler Dror Walter Anthony F. Lemieux
raw_title: Resistance is Far-Right from Futile: Deplatforming, Resilience, and Persistent Presence Across Platforms as Drivers of Accelerationist Politics
title_en: Resistance is Far-Right from Futile: Deplatforming, Resilience, and Persistent Presence Across Platforms as Drivers of Accelerationist Politics
title_zh: 抵抗并非徒劳：去平台化、韧性及跨平台持续存在作为加速主义政治的驱动因素
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了极右翼团体在被主流平台封禁后，如何通过跨平台持续存在和展现韧性，反而推动了加速主义政治的发展。它分析了去平台化措施可能产生的意外后果。
plain_summary_en: This study examines how far-right groups, after being banned from mainstream platforms, can drive accelerationist politics through persistent presence across platforms and resilience. It analyzes the unintended consequences of deplatforming measures.
research_direction_zh: 该研究属于政治传播领域，关注数字时代极端主义内容的传播机制、平台治理政策的有效性及其对政治激进化的影响。
research_direction_en: This research falls within political communication, focusing on the dissemination mechanisms of extremist content in the digital age, the effectiveness of platform governance policies, and their impact on political radicalization.
